title: SieveErrorKind and SieveError missing PartialEq
description: parse_error.rs: SieveErrorKind and SieveError derive Debug and Clone but not PartialEq. Test assertions on compile() errors must inspect the .message string (lib.rs:461-465, tests/rfc_vectors.rs:425-429) because they cannot compare error kinds directly. assert_eq!(err.kind, SieveErrorKind::UnsupportedExtension("vacation".to_string())) is clearer than string-contains checks. Add PartialEq and Eq to both.
